svg.title: Final gateway-commanded protocol — 4 phases
svg.desc: Sequence diagram: OTAA handshake, measure cycle, heartbeat, autonomous shake alert
svg.text: phase 2 — measure cycle (auto every 60 s + serial 'm' key)
ACK (stops GW retries — sensor read starts now)
DATA · {ph, tds, turb, temps, batt, e=None}
phase 4 — shake / fall alert (autonomous, highest priority)
① IoT ACKs MEASURE_REQ before touching sensors — stops GW retries, buys 5 s
② Shake bypasses LoRa mutex queue — dedicated high-priority TX path
③ IoT sensor task sleeps on TaskNotification — only wakes when ControlTask signals
